name: Judy Nichols
body: When the trials come, we're so prone to say, "Why me, Lord?" When the miracle comes, we say it with a whole different thing in mind -- "I could never have deserved this."

name: Emily Lee
body: Praise God. We can echo all those thoughts and feelings and realizations. The Lord gives and the Lord takes away -- blessed be the name of the Lord! ❤️

name: Sondra Rush
body: Celebrating each step with you and will continue to pray as you move forward. Much love, Kevin, Sondra, Selah, Aliyah, and Mylah

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Hallelujah! Incredible once again how God is healing her and speaking to you through sunsets. May it be so that this 9 months can be behind you all for good. Sending our love and hugs!
